title: Elon Musk Publicly Reveals xAI Plans for the First Time
description: Elon Musk revealed on Twitter that he was preparing xAI, with the goal of 'understanding the true nature of the universe.' The company had already been registered in Nevada prior to this.

title: xAI Officially Founded
description: xAI was officially announced at a Twitter Spaces live event. The core team included top researchers from Google DeepMind, OpenAI, Microsoft, and other organizations.

title: xAI Team Publicly Unveiled
description: xAI announced its core team list, including Igor Babuschkin, Manuel Kroiss, Yuhuai Wu, and others, emphasizing a R&D philosophy of 'maximally pursuing truth.'

title: Grok-1 First Released
description: xAI launched its first AI model, Grok, featuring a 'rebellious personality' and real-time X platform information integration, initially available to X Premium+ subscribers.

title: xAI Deep Integration with X Platform
description: Grok was fully integrated into the X platform (Twitter), allowing users to directly invoke Grok in tweet replies for summarization and Q&A.

title: Grok-1 Open-Sourced
description: xAI released the Grok-1 model weights under an Apache 2.0 open-source license, with 314 billion parameters, making it one of the largest open-source models at the time.

title: Grok-1.5 Released
description: xAI released Grok-1.5, with significantly improved reasoning and programming capabilities, supporting 128K token long-context processing.

title: Grok-1.5V Multimodal Version Released
description: xAI launched its first multimodal model, Grok-1.5V, supporting image understanding and visual Q&A, capable of processing documents, charts, and photos.

title: xAI Completes $6 Billion Series B
description: xAI raised $6 billion from Sequoia Capital, Andreessen Horowitz, and others, at a valuation of approximately $24 billion. The funds are used to accelerate infrastructure construction.

title: Grok-2 Released
description: xAI released the Grok-2 series models, including Grok-2 and Grok-2 mini, with significantly improved reasoning and tool-use capabilities, achieving performance close to GPT-4 level.

title: Aurora Image Generator Launched
description: xAI launched the Aurora image generation tool on the X platform, powered by Grok-2, allowing users to generate and share images directly on the social platform.

title: Colossus Supercomputer Goes Online
description: The Colossus supercomputer, built by xAI in collaboration with Nvidia, was officially launched, equipped with 100,000 H100 GPUs, making it the world's largest AI training cluster.

title: xAI Secures $6 Billion Series C
description: xAI raised another $6 billion in funding, with investors including A16z, BlackRock, and others, reaching a valuation of $50 billion, further expanding training infrastructure.

title: Grok-3 Released
description: xAI released its flagship model Grok-3, touted as 'the smartest AI on Earth,' achieving top-tier performance in math, science, and programming benchmarks, integrating DeepSearch reasoning capabilities.

title: xAI Announces Acquisition of X (Twitter)
description: Elon Musk announced that xAI would acquire the X platform in an all-stock transaction valued at $45 billion, achieving deep integration and privatization of AI and social platforms.

title: Grok-3 Open-Source Weights Released
description: xAI released the Grok-3 base model weights under an open-source license, allowing researchers and developers to freely use this top-tier model for research and application development.

title: xAI Secures Additional $5 Billion Funding
description: xAI obtained a new round of $5 billion in funding, with its valuation surpassing $50 billion. The company plans to further expand its Memphis data center and increase GPU cluster scale.
